dare: Send a voice note saying 'I am the greatest human being alive' in your most dramatic voice! 🎤
Change your profile photo to a funny face for the next 1 hour! 😂
Send a message to someone you haven't talked to in months saying 'I miss you!' 💬
Do 20 pushups right now and send proof! 💪
Text your mom or dad 'I accidentally joined a circus, please don't worry'! 🎪
Send a voice note of you singing the first song that comes to your head! 🎵
Type the next 5 messages using only your nose! 👃
Send a thumbs up emoji to 5 different contacts right now with no explanation! 👍
Post a story on WhatsApp with just the word 'BANANA' in capital letters! 🍌
Say the alphabet backwards out loud and send a voice note! 🔤
Do your best impression of your favorite celebrity in a voice note! 🌟
Send a message to the last person you called saying 'Wrong number, bye'! 📱
Write a 3-line poem about a potato and send it right now! 🥔
Do the robot dance and send a video! 🤖
Send a voice note in your funniest accent for 30 seconds! 🌍
Take a selfie with the most ridiculous face you can make and send it! 🤪
Reply to every message in this chat with a different fruit emoji for the next 10 minutes! 🍎
Write your name with your non-dominant hand and send a photo! ✍️
Say something nice about every person in this chat right now! 🥰
Narrate everything you are doing right now like a sports commentator for 1 minute in a voice note! 🎙️
